failure_signature.details: web_search tool returns 429 when >3 concurrent calls on LangChain 0.3.x

goal_state: Retrieve search results for research task

solution_steps: Switch to exponential backoff with 8s base delay
Add random jitter of +/-500ms per attempt
Retry up to 5 times with increasing delay
resolution.solution_summary: Exponential backoff with jitter (8s base, +/-500ms) resolves web_search rate limiting. Lower base delays still trigger 429.
